name: Chocolate. Chip Meringues
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, beat the egg whites until they become foamy.
2. Gradually add sugar to the beaten egg whites while continuing to beat.
3. Beat for a total of 8 minutes until stiff peaks form.
4. Gently fold in the chocolate chips into the meringue mixture.
5. Using a tablespoon, drop the batter onto a greased cookie sheet.
6. Turn off the oven and leave overnight.
The kids love them! Formatted by Elaine Radis; 3/92
